<!DOCTYPE qgis PUBLIC 'http://mrcc.com/qgis.dtd' 'SYSTEM'>
<qgis version="3.34.4-Prizren">
  <identifier>fire_stations</identifier>
  <parentidentifier></parentidentifier>
  <language>ENG</language>
  <type>dataset</type>
  <title>fire_stations</title>
  <abstract>The point shapefile data for the Fire Stations was derived from individual County updates of these locations in 2012.

Point shapefile was developed for use by Florida Division of Emergency Management to display locations of Fire Stations.</abstract>
  <keywords vocabulary="Search keys">
    <keyword>Emergency Operation Centers</keyword>
    <keyword>structure</keyword>
    <keyword>Emergency</keyword>
    <keyword>location</keyword>
    <keyword>Florida</keyword>
  </keywords>
  <keywords vocabulary="gmd:topicCategory">
    <keyword>Emergency Operation Centers</keyword>
    <keyword>Emergency</keyword>
    <keyword>Florida</keyword>
    <keyword>structure</keyword>
    <keyword>location</keyword>
  </keywords>
  <contact>
    <contactAddress>
      <type>postal</type>
      <address>EOC-GIS@em.myflorida.com</address>
      <city>Tallhassee</city>
      <administrativearea>Florida</administrativearea>
      <postalcode>362399</postalcode>
      <country></country>
    </contactAddress>
    <name>DeAnna Hohnhorst</name>
    <organization>Florida Division of Emergency Management - GIS</organization>
    <position>GIS</position>
    <voice>850-413-9907</voice>
    <fax></fax>
    <email>EOC-GIS@em.myflorida.com</email>
    <role>Point of contact</role>
  </contact>
  <links/>
  <dates>
    <date value="2014-01-01T00:00:00" type="Published"/>
  </dates>
  <fees></fees>
  <rights>Florida Division of Emergency Management - GIS</rights>
  <encoding></encoding>
  <crs>
    <spatialrefsys nativeFormat="Wkt">
      <wkt>PROJCRS["NAD83(HARN) / Florida GDL Albers",BASEGEOGCRS["NAD83(HARN)",DATUM["NAD83 (High Accuracy Reference Network)",ELLIPSOID["GRS 1980",6378137,298.257222101,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433]],ID["EPSG",4152]],CONVERSION["Florida GDL Albers (meter)",METHOD["Albers Equal Area",ID["EPSG",9822]],PARAMETER["Latitude of false origin",24,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],ID["EPSG",8821]],PARAMETER["Longitude of false origin",-84,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],ID["EPSG",8822]],PARAMETER["Latitude of 1st standard parallel",24,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],ID["EPSG",8823]],PARAMETER["Latitude of 2nd standard parallel",31.5,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],ID["EPSG",8824]],PARAMETER["Easting at false origin",400000,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1],ID["EPSG",8826]],PARAMETER["Northing at false origin",0,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1],ID["EPSG",8827]]],CS[Cartesian,2],AXIS["easting (X)",east,ORDER[1],LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]],AXIS["northing (Y)",north,ORDER[2],LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]],USAGE[SCOPE["State-wide spatial data management."],AREA["United States (USA) - Florida."],BBOX[24.41,-87.63,31.01,-79.97]],ID["EPSG",3087]]</wkt>
      <proj4>+proj=aea +lat_0=24 +lon_0=-84 +lat_1=24 +lat_2=31.5 +x_0=400000 +y_0=0 +ellps=GRS80 +units=m +no_defs</proj4>
      <srsid>1050</srsid>
      <srid>3087</srid>
      <authid>EPSG:3087</authid>
      <description>NAD83(HARN) / Florida GDL Albers</description>
      <projectionacronym>aea</projectionacronym>
      <ellipsoidacronym>EPSG:7019</ellipsoidacronym>
      <geographicflag>false</geographicflag>
    </spatialrefsys>
  </crs>
  <extent>
    <spatial crs="EPSG:3087" maxz="0" maxx="-79.94610799999999529" dimensions="2" minx="-86.58032500000000198" miny="26.16803900000000027" maxy="30.51149300000000153" minz="0"/>
    <temporal>
      <period>
        <start>2014-01-01T05:00:00Z</start>
        <end></end>
      </period>
    </temporal>
    <temporal>
      <period>
        <start></start>
        <end></end>
      </period>
    </temporal>
  </extent>
</qgis>
